title: Blackberry Gratin
description: A sweet and tangy dessert featuring fresh blackberries and a crunchy malaysian-inspired topping.
instructions: In a separate bowl, mix together panko breadcrumbs, sugar, and grated parmesan cheese.
In a separate bowl, whisk the beaten egg and add to the breadcrumb mixture. Mix until well combined.
Add the unsalted butter to the breadcrumb mixture and mix until the butter is evenly distributed.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, arrange the fresh blackberries in an even layer.
Pour the breadcrumb mixture evenly over the blackberries.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the fruit is tender.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
